organization.name: DIGITAL LABOUR
organization.mission_statement: Deploy and monetize autonomous AI agents as modular digital labor units. Every department, agent, and system exists to support Digital Labour objectives.

pillars.AGENCY: DIGITAL LABOUR — Operational framework, hierarchy, orchestration
pillars.ALOPS: Digital Labour — AI labor operations, the revenue engine
pillars.BANK: AAC — Accounting, equity bank, financial operations

primary_directive.description: All DIGITAL LABOUR infrastructure serves Digital Labour. The hierarchy provides the framework. The orchestrator runs the pipeline. The bus carries DL events. Intelligence feeds DL strategy. Every agent either directly produces revenue through DL or supports those that do.

executive_council.name: Executive Council
executive_council.description: Strategic oversight — all decisions measured against Digital Labour objectives
executive_council.head: Agent AZ
executive_council.primary_focus: Digital Labour growth, revenue targets, strategic resource allocation
responsibilities: Set Digital Labour growth targets and mandates
Enforce ALOPS doctrine across all departments
Final authority on pricing, agent deployment, client onboarding

digital_labour_operations.name: Digital Labour Operations
digital_labour_operations.description: THE PRIMARY DEPARTMENT — autonomous AI labor workforce that earns revenue
digital_labour_operations.head: AXIOM (CEO Agent)
digital_labour_operations.primary_focus: Task execution, QA, client delivery, agent scaling

worker_agents.name: Worker Agent Fleet
worker_agents.description: 26 autonomous task-execution agents that deliver paid outcomes

dispatcher.name: Task Dispatcher
dispatcher.description: Routes tasks to agents with daily limits and token budget enforcement

nerve_daemon.name: NERVE Autonomous Daemon
nerve_daemon.description: 24/7 autonomous cycle: self-check, gap analysis, prospecting, outreach, C-Suite cadence

intake_api.name: Client Intake API
intake_api.description: FastAPI webhook for task submission, client onboarding, payment processing

intelligence_operations.name: Intelligence Operations Department
intelligence_operations.description: Information gathering and analysis — feeds DL strategy and market intelligence
intelligence_operations.head: Intelligence Director
intelligence_operations.dl_mandate: All intelligence products must include actionable insights for Digital Labour growth

youtube_intelligence.name: YouTube Intelligence Division
youtube_intelligence.dl_purpose: Identify market trends, competitor analysis, prospect research for DL agents

research_intelligence.name: Research Intelligence Division
research_intelligence.dl_purpose: Research for DL agent improvement, new agent capabilities, market positioning

operations_command.name: Operations Command Department
operations_command.description: Day-to-day platform operations — keeps the DL infrastructure running
operations_command.head: Operations Commander
operations_command.dl_mandate: Uptime and reliability of the DL execution pipeline is the top priority

financial_operations.name: Financial Operations Department
financial_operations.description: All Digital Labour financials — AAC accounting, equity bank, DL revenue, cost management
financial_operations.head: Financial Director
financial_operations.dl_mandate: Track DL revenue, enforce margins, manage billing and invoicing

aac_accounting.name: AAC Accounting & Equity Bank
aac_accounting.description: Central accounting system — CentralAccounting, TradingExecution, CryptoIntelligence

dl_revenue_tracking.name: DL Revenue & Billing Division
dl_revenue_tracking.description: Digital Labour billing, invoicing, retainer management, cost-per-task tracking

technology_infrastructure.name: Technology Infrastructure Department
technology_infrastructure.description: Platform engineering — keeps DL systems, APIs, and monitoring operational
technology_infrastructure.head: Chief Technology Officer
technology_infrastructure.dl_mandate: All platform work prioritizes DL uptime, API reliability, and agent performance

agents.name: NCL Second Brain Processor
agents.role: Knowledge Extraction for DL Agent Training

platform_engineering.name: Platform Engineering Division
platform_engineering.description: Infrastructure and platform maintenance for DL operations

resonance_bridges.ncc_bridge: resonance/ncc_bridge.py — publishes DL events to NCC relay
resonance_bridges.ncl_bridge: resonance/ncl_bridge.py — reads NCL intelligence for AXIOM
resonance_bridges.aac_bridge: resonance/aac_bridge.py — reads AAC financials for LEDGR
resonance_bridges.sync: resonance/sync.py — cadence runner for cross-pillar sync

naming_resolution.context_manager: SA: agents/context_manager.py | DL: agents/context_manager/ — prefix DL as dl_context_manager
naming_resolution.production_manager: SA: hierarchy reference | DL: agents/production_manager/ — prefix DL as dl_production_manager
naming_resolution.qa_manager: SA: hierarchy reference | DL: agents/qa_manager/ — prefix DL as dl_qa_manager
naming_resolution.automation_manager: SA: hierarchy reference | DL: agents/automation_manager/ — prefix DL as dl_automation_manager

council_separation.rationale: Council serves as strategic oversight — all strategy measured against DL objectives
boundaries: Council sets Digital Labour growth targets and mandates
DL C-Suite (AXIOM/VECTIS/LEDGR) reports to Executive Council
Departments handle operational execution in service of DL
Council approval required for major structural changes
Daily DL operations autonomous within department authority levels

HIGH.description: Department Heads & DL C-Suite - High Authority

BASIC.description: Standard Agents & DL Workers - Basic Authority

council_reporting.format: Executive Summary + DL Revenue Metrics + Agent Performance
